nativeProps: HTML div attributes except owned children and change behavior

compositionPolicy.publicComponents: Composes canonical DataTable, Dialog, Button, Alert, Badge, and Skeleton source items around native labelled editor fields.
compositionPolicy.adapter: The consumer owns persistence, authorization, validation, conflict resolution, audit, network, privacy, retention, and every side effect.
compositionPolicy.enhancements: Saved views, bulk actions, optimistic mutations, delete undo, and the mutation timeline are independent opt-ins.
